Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay All Proceedings
Off Calendar Nov-10-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Elliot Conn (415-417-2781; elliot@connlawpc.com) of Conn Law, PC for Plaintiff Wayne Yen.
Blake Ramsay (blake.ramsay@morganlewis.com) for Defendant.

ARGUED (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT BMW OF NORTH AMERICA, LLC's Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay All Proceedings.

Defendant BMW N.A.'s motion to compel arbitration is granted.

[see word minute for details]

order signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2020 Continued To Dec-30-20 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
